concept: How about a game where the protagonist can fold space like origami, creating shortcuts between locations by literally folding the game world? Master increasingly complex folding patterns that connect distant points while avoiding spatial paradoxes that can trap you between dimensions. Encounter strange entities that exist in the creases between folded reality, some helpful and others hostile to your spatial manipulations. Discover that the universe itself is an elaborate fold created by ancient geometers who left clues to their ultimate cosmological purpose.
